name: @prune/futures-desk
description: F16 — token pre-commitment / futures desk. An actor-facing reservation instrument: declare non-urgent work with a deadline and capture the real published Batch/off-peak discount (latency-for-price). Deterministic eligibility (enough lead time to use the slow lane) + honest pricing (interactive vs discounted cost via @prune/shared; null on unpriced model). The discount rate is caller-supplied (the provider's published Batch rate) — never fabricated. Sits above the batch-tier router as the demand-side commitment contract. No regex, no model.
